summary: Full backend + frontend testing of KeySense app. All 8 backend pytest tests passed. All critical UI components verified via Playwright.

issues: BPM shows 0 for pure sine wave test file - expected behavior, librosa beat detection needs actual beats

critical_code_review_comments: BPM detection returns 0 for simple sine wave (no beats) - this is expected librosa behavior, not a bug
server.py is clean and well-structured, all _id fields excluded from MongoDB responses
seed_data_creation: None (test tracks cleaned up during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working: upload zone, analyze endpoint, results panel (key/scale/bpm/confidence/camelot/waveform/compatible-keys), library CRUD, export, reset, mic modal. Delete track data-testid is 'track-delete-{id}'. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_keysense.py.
